issue.weather: Cloudy w/ chance of patch notes

ticker.text: Pragmata launches to 97% positive on Steam — Capcom delivers
GTA 6 confirmed for November 19 — Rockstar enters release fiscal year
Hades II now on PS5 and Xbox — day one on Game Pass
Saros goes gold — Housemarque's Returnal follow-up locks April 30 date
Epic Games reportedly building a Disney extraction shooter separate from Fortnite

lead.title: Capcom's Moon Game Was Worth Every Delay
lead.dek: Six years of cryptic trailers, broken release windows, and meme-worthy silence — and then Pragmata landed and reminded everyone why patience in gaming still means something. A deep look at the year's first must-play.
lead.author: Romello Morris

poll.question: Which 2026 release has the most to prove?

spotlight.title: A Radio Station at the End of the World
spotlight.blurb: In Longwave, you broadcast from a lighthouse after the signal dies. There is no combat, no inventory — only listeners to find and songs to choose. It's the most affecting thing a solo developer has shipped all year.

comments.name: Devon A.
comments.body: The correction point is real but it cuts both ways — indies are absorbing the design risk while AAA hides behind 'service.' Who's paying the rent on experimentation?

comments.name: Priya N.
comments.body: Hollow Season review is correct. Spent three hours last night just arranging jars on a shelf. The game lets you be tired. Nothing else does.

comments.name: Kenji R.
comments.body: Miyazaki quote is huge if true. Elden Ring was magnificent but the formula has edges we've all felt. A return to Sekiro-shaped spaces would be a gift.

comments.name: Sana O.
comments.body: Longwave is my new religion. I don't know how to describe it to people without sounding like I've joined a cult.
